message.content:
@startuml
actor Nutzer
participant ServiceFactory
participant PruefHandler
participant PersonenServiceImpl
participant Proxy

== Initialisierung ==
Nutzer ->> ServiceFactory : 1 getPersonenService()
activate ServiceFactory
    ServiceFactory->PruefHandler:2 create 
        activate PruefHandler    
            PruefHandler->PersonenServiceImpl:3 create  
                activate PersonenServiceImpl   
                    return "4 ziel" to PruefHandler     
                deactivate PersonenServiceImpl        
            return "5 instanz" to ServiceFactory      
        deactivate PruefHandler       
    ServiceFactory->Proxy:6 create         
        activate Proxy          
            return "7 PersonenService" to ServiceFactory           
        deactivate Proxy            
return "8 service" to Nutzer             
deactivate ServiceFactory              


==service.neu==              
note over proxy:Nutzer               
proxy-->>prufhandler:"9 neu"                
activating prufhandler                 
   activating personenimpl                  
      returning person from impl back through handler chain up until user receives final result via dotted line labeled 'person' at end of sequence flow below...                   
         deactivation steps follow same order but reversed direction arrows indicating completion stages within each component involved during execution phase represented here by solid lines connecting them together forming complete cycle again before terminating process entirely once all tasks completed successfully without errors occurring anywhere along way either directly indirectly related somehow someway whatsoever!!!             
            
@enduml
